TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Lood no Rosiya-Afohan Tomireng to kona Afohan Kalotamdawan Tang mitatoy to sakowan no kitakit, nikawrira palili'en no Amilika to payso ko Islam Sofitay mamifelih to aniniay a sifo, sapidipotaw to aniniay a sifo ko Rosiya i 1979 miheca 12 folad 24 romi'ad ocor han to ko sofitay a mitoker to nicokeran no Amirika a komi,na onini to ko sakala'aised no Rosiya ato Akirika, satapang sato ko lalood to mo'etep ko mihecan, 'aloman ko mahikedaay a kalotamdaw tona lalood, 1989 miheca sawad sato ko Rosiya a malalood nokay sanay to ko polong no sofitay.
S.PHON: ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ro~usija-afo~uħan to~umirəŋ to~u ko~una afo~uħan kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮawan taŋ mitato~uj to~u sako~uwan no~u kitakit, nikawrira paɾiɾiʡən no~u amiɾika to~u pajso~u ko~u isɾam so~ufitaj mamifəɾiħ to~u aniniaj a sifo~u, sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw to~u aniniaj a sifo~u ko~u ro~usija i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~uʦo~ur ħan to~u ko~u so~ufitaj a mito~ukər to~u niʦo~ukəran no~u amirika a ko~umi,na o~unini to~u ko~u sakaɾaʡaisəɬ~ɮ no~u ro~usija ato~u akirika, satapaŋ sato~u ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u mo~uʡətəp ko~u miħəʦan, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u maħikəɬ~ɮaaj a kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw to~una ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, **** miħəʦa sawaɬ~ɮ sato~u ko~u ro~usija a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~ukaj sanaj to~u ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u so~ufitaj.
S.FORM: Lood no Rosiya-Afohan Tomireng to kona Afohan Kalotamdawan Tang mitatoy to sakowan no kitakit, nikawrira palili'en no Amilika to payso ko Islam Sofitay mamifelih to aniniay a sifo, sapidipotaw to aniniay a sifo ko Rosiya i 1979 miheca 12 folad 24 romi'ad ocor han to ko sofitay a mitoker to nicokeran no Amirika a komi,na onini to ko sakala'aised no Rosiya ato Akirika, satapang sato ko lalood to mo'etep ko mihecan, 'aloman ko mahikedaay a kalotamdaw tona lalood, 1989 miheca sawad sato ko Rosiya a malalood nokay sanay to ko polong no sofitay.
S.PHON: ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ro~usija-afo~uħan to~umirəŋ to~u ko~una afo~uħan kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮawan taŋ mitato~uj to~u sako~uwan no~u kitakit, nikawrira paɾiɾiʡən no~u amiɾika to~u pajso~u ko~u isɾam so~ufitaj mamifəɾiħ to~u aniniaj a sifo~u, sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw to~u aniniaj a sifo~u ko~u ro~usija i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~uʦo~ur ħan to~u ko~u so~ufitaj a mito~ukər to~u niʦo~ukəran no~u amirika a ko~umi,na o~unini to~u ko~u sakaɾaʡaisəɬ~ɮ no~u ro~usija ato~u akirika, satapaŋ sato~u ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u mo~uʡətəp ko~u miħəʦan, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u maħikəɬ~ɮaaj a kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw to~una ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, **** miħəʦa sawaɬ~ɮ sato~u ko~u ro~usija a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~ukaj sanaj to~u ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u so~ufitaj.
